Metadata.title: Huarong Lianda (Chongqing) Technology Co., Ltd. - Global Automotive Industry Ecosystem Platform
Metadata.description: Huarong Lianda specializes in vehicle sales, auto parts, customized vehicles, and global automotive industry services. As a promoter of China's automotive industry going global, we provide full-link solutions covering 80+ countries and regions.
Metadata.keywords: Huarong Lianda, Vehicle Export, Car Sales, Auto Parts, New Energy Vehicles, Automotive Export, Automotive Supply Chain

Header.slogan: United to Advance, United to Prosper

Footer.description: Builder and enabler of China's automobile industry overseas ecosystem platform, assisting the global layout of China's automobile industry.

CompanyIntro.title: Trusted Choice of Global Automotive Industry
CompanyIntro.subtitle: Empowering Chinese Automotive Brands to Shine in the International Market
CompanyIntro.description: Huarong Lianda (Chongqing) Technology Co., Ltd. is a comprehensive automotive industry service company, focusing on whole vehicle sales (including new energy vehicles), mobility operations, special vehicle customization, auto parts sales, vehicle dismantling and remanufacturing, as well as automotive aftermarket services and marketing consulting. We are committed to building a highly integrated and efficient closed-loop ecosystem for the automotive industry.

Solutions.title: Full Value Chain Service Solutions
Solutions.subtitle: Two Major Tracks Assisting Chinese Automotive Enterprises in Global Layout
Solutions.card1_desc: Providing multiple brands and models, covering sedans, pickups, SUVs, and commercial vehicles, meeting diverse global customer needs.
Solutions.card2_desc: Deep cooperation with OEMs and supporting manufacturers, with stable and continuous supply of over 200,000 types of parts.

SuccessCases.title: Success Cases
SuccessCases.subtitle: From Siberian cold to equatorial sun, our commitment to delivery remains unshaken. Every timely order delivery fulfills our responsibility in China's auto export. Every contract highlights global customer trust.

StrategicPartners.title: Strategic Partners
StrategicPartners.subtitle: Established strategic cooperation with mainstream domestic OEM brands such as Changan Minsheng Logistics, Sanyang Ma Logistics, Sinotrans, and China Import and Export Group.

GlobalNetwork.title: Global Business Network Coverage
GlobalNetwork.description: We have established a comprehensive business network and partnerships globally, achieving a business layout in 80+ countries and regions, covering Asia, Europe, North America, South America, Africa, and Oceania. We provide comprehensive international service support for the automotive industry chain and assist Chinese automotive brands in going global.

About.title: About Us
About.description: Leader in China's New Energy Vehicle Industry Going Global
About.video_title: Smart Chain Without Borders, Win-Win with Principles
About.video_subtitle: Huarong Lianda · Enabler of the Full Chain of China's Auto Industry Going Global
About.intro_description: Huarong Lianda (Chongqing) Technology Co., Ltd. is a comprehensive automotive industry service company, focusing on complete vehicle sales (including new energy vehicles), transportation operations, special vehicle customization, auto parts sales, vehicle dismantling and remanufacturing, as well as automotive aftermarket services and marketing consulting, dedicated to creating a highly integrated and efficiently collaborative closed-loop ecosystem for the automotive industry.

CustomerValue.title:
Powerful Customer Value Will Bring
Huge Success to Your Business

team_power.title: Team Strength
team_power.description: Core team members come from brand OEMs with over 20 years of automotive industry experience. The core team has served mainstream automotive brands such as Changan, Geely, Chery, SAIC, and GAC, possessing rich resources and practical experience in technical support, product planning, marketing promotion, after-sales service, and customer relations.

rich_sources.title: Rich Vehicle Sources
rich_sources.description: Exporting best-selling models, including mainstream Japanese, Korean, European, and American brand models produced in China, covering fuel and new energy vehicles to meet different customer needs. Customized models and special vehicles are launched for the African market. At the same time, we cooperate with domestic modification and dismantling companies to provide refurbished used cars and remanufactured parts services.

cost_reduction.title: Cost Reduction
cost_reduction.description: Integrating global supply chain resources, optimizing supply chain processes, reducing intermediate links, and reducing large-scale procurement costs by 15%-20%.

efficiency.title: Efficiency Doubling
efficiency.description:
Establishing an efficient quotation system to provide accurate quotes within 24 hours, respond quickly to customer needs within 48 hours, and provide multilingual services in English, Russian, and Spanish to shorten the delivery cycle.
Adopting advanced logistics management systems to track cargo status in real-time, ensuring on-time delivery and improving customer satisfaction.

service_first.title: Service First
service_first.description:
• Provide one-stop services from procurement, transportation, customs clearance, delivery to after-sales, saving worry and effort.
• Provide customized vehicle portfolio based on customer needs to meet the special needs of different markets and customer groups.
• Design flexible financial solutions to support inventory financing and relieve customer financial pressure.
• Provide free marketing plan consultation and planning for customers.

bottom_banner.text: Customer-centric, practicing core values of creating value for customers and solving problems for customers
